name: Spam Western Pasta
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Lone Star pasta, cooked see notes
12 ounces Spam® Lite luncheon meat, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine cooked macaroni, cubed luncheon meat, shredded cheese, carrots, celery, bell peppers, and onions.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the mayonnaise, dijon mustard, and barbecue sauce.
3. Pour the dressing over the pasta mixture and toss well to combine.
4. Cover the dish and refrigerate for one hour before serving.
